variant: System IA and LC-12 O/H Beam Option
product_type: Overhead Beam Support Assembly for System IA-10 and LC-12 Series

installation_requirements.purpose: Permits installation of these lifts on lower specification concrete floors

LC-12_and_LC-12-3SA.requirement_with_overhead_beam: 6-1/2 inch thick, 3250 PSI or 4-1/2 inch thick, 4000 PSI

installation_requirements.concrete_slab_notes: Continuous concrete slabs to be free of defects and cracks, provide proper anchor edge distance to seams, and have a minimum of 6x6 wire mesh reinforcement

specifications.title: System IA and LC-12 O/H Beam Option
specifications.welding_specs: AWS specifications to E-70xx electrodes or E-70T1 Code 5.3 flux core wire only

features: Overhead beam option connects the two posts at the top
Allows installation on lower specification concrete floors
Overhead shutoff cable connected to motor shutoff switch
Shows front view and side view of installed configuration
Reduces concrete PSI requirement for System IA-10 from 4000 to 3250 PSI
Reduces concrete thickness for LC-12 from 6-1/2 inch to 4-1/2 inch (at 4000 PSI)
safety_features: Overhead shutoff cable connected to motor shutoff switch
Concrete slabs must be continuous, free of defects and cracks
Proper anchor edge distance to seams required
notes: This is the general overview drawing showing the O/H Beam option installed on the lift
Companion drawing ZZ1454-A-100 (Short version) provides detailed parts list
Overhead shutoff cable clearly labeled connecting to motor shutoff switch
